description: Apache Log4j2 <=2.14.1 JNDI features do not protect against adversary-controlled LDAP and other JNDI related endpoints.
An elevation of privilege vulnerability exists in Windows Netlogon Remote Protocol.
In Pulse Secure Pulse Connect Secure, an authenticated attacker can send a specially crafted request to the admin web interface.
The SMBv1 server in Microsoft Windows allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via crafted packets.
A remote code execution vulnerability exists in Microsoft Exchange Server.
